prompt: Conduct a GOVERN gap assessment for our organization. We have an AI ethics statement but no formal AI risk policy, no cross-functional AI team, no defined risk tolerance for AI, and our legal team is not involved in AI deployments. Rate each GOVERN category and give us a prioritised remediation plan.
assertions: Assesses all 6 GOVERN categories: GV-1 through GV-6 with individual status ratings
Rates GV-1 as partial (ethics statement exists but no formal risk policy), GV-4 and GV-6 as not started based on stated facts
Provides specific remediation actions for each gap including drafting an AI Risk Management Policy
Includes a prioritised roadmap distinguishing quick wins from medium/long-term actions
Recommends establishing cross-functional AI risk working group including legal as a specific action for GV-4
